title: Automations fitting scaffold (own-port, YAML store, 8 step types)

implement.detail: new fittings/seed/automations own-port fitting (provides automation-runner, port 7090): lib/types.mjs (8 step types, validate/normalize), lib/store.mjs (YAML CRUD at ~/.garrison/automations, path-confined ids), lib/ulid.mjs; scripts/server.mjs (CRUD REST + /health + status-file registration + DIST static serve, path-traversal confined) + start.mjs + setup.sh (npm install js-yaml); package.json; registered in data/library.json

test.detail: automations-store.test (7: 8-step-types, validate, YAML save/get/list/delete, auto-id, path-traversal reject); validate-fitting 4/4 PASS; live CRUD smoke (health+create+list) on :7195 ok; typecheck clean

review.detail: self-caught + fixed a static-serve path-traversal before codex

codexReview.detail: batched with E2 — store + engine live in the same fitting; review together once the run engine lands
